exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your personal branding forward
items: Create and optimize your professional LinkedIn profile with a compelling headline, summary, and portfolio showcase
Schedule and conduct 3 informational interviews with professionals in your target industry or role
Create a personal brand portfolio website or landing page showcasing your expertise and achievements
Develop and publish 5 pieces of thought leadership content in your area of expertise over the next month
Identify and join 2-3 professional associations or online communities relevant to your industry and actively participate
Create a 30-60 second elevator pitch that clearly communicates your unique value proposition and practice delivering it
